name: arXiv (uvx)
description: Search, download, and read arXiv research papers. Query arXiv with category/date filters, fetch papers as markdown, run citation-graph lookups, and watch topics for new publications. Downloaded papers are cached locally (default ~/.arxiv-mcp-server/papers; override with the --storage-path flag).

auth.instructions: No authentication required. arXiv is queried over its public API. Papers are stored locally at ~/.arxiv-mcp-server/papers by default; to change the location, add "--storage-path" and a directory to the command arguments (e.g. args: ["arxiv-mcp-server", "--storage-path", "/path/to/papers"]).
